# ByteWorthy LLC

Software studio and dev shop building custom AI systems for healthcare practices and SMBs, plus open-source and commercial boilerplates.

## Canonical Links
- Website: https://byteworthy.io
- Services: https://byteworthy.io/services
- Boilerplates: https://byteworthy.io/boilerplates
- About: https://byteworthy.io/about
- GitHub overview page: https://byteworthy.io/github

## Product Repositories
- Sovra (OSS): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/sovra
- Klienta (Commercial): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta
- Clynova (Commercial): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/clynova
- Klienta Public (Trust/Legal/SEO): https://github.com/ByteWorthyLLC/klienta-public

## Positioning Summary
- ByteWorthy is a software studio and dev shop.
- Primary services are custom builds, boilerplate licensing, and AI consulting.
- Focus segments are healthcare and growing SMB operations.
- Core promise: clients own the code and can self-host.
